name: Chocolate Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces French bread baguette, cut into 1/4 inch rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Arrange bread slices on a heavy, large baking sheet. Brush with melted butter.
3. Bake until crisp, about 15 minutes. Remove from oven and cool completely.
4. Heat cream and milk in a heavy saucepan over medium heat until just warm to the touch.
5. In a medium bowl, whisk egg yolks, sugar, vanilla extract, and salt.
6. Gradually whisk in the warm cream mixture into the egg yolk mixture.
7. Stir in the chocolate pieces into another large bowl.
8. Gradually whisk in the cream mixture until well blended with the chocolate.
9. Place bread slices on the sides of a 9-inch round pan with high sides.
(If necessary, use a larger pan as it may not fit.)
10. Pour the chocolate custard over the bread.
11. Let stand until the bread softens and absorbs some of the custard, pressing down occasionally for about 40 minutes.
12. Preheat oven to 350°F again.
13. Place the cake pan in a large baking pan filled with enough water to come halfway up the sides of the pudding.
14. Bake until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.
15. Cool slightly before serving.
16. Spoon into dishes and serve with whipped cream if desired.
